mwaa.environment.loggingconfiguration.Da.Docs: Defines the processing logs sent to CloudWatch Logs and the logging level to send.

mwaa.environment.loggingconfiguration.Sc.Docs: Defines the scheduler logs sent to CloudWatch Logs and the logging level to send.

mwaa.environment.loggingconfiguration.Ta.Docs: Defines the task logs sent to CloudWatch Logs and the logging level to send.

mwaa.environment.loggingconfiguration.We.Docs: Defines the web server logs sent to CloudWatch Logs and the logging level to send.

mwaa.environment.loggingconfiguration.Wo.Docs: Defines the worker logs sent to CloudWatch Logs and the logging level to send.
